title: Property / Facilities Executive [EL]
description:
Procurement

  • Review material specifications and relevant documentation.
  • Coordinate with overseas suppliers and counterparts to confirm material requirements, including quantity and specifications.
  • Monitor and manage procurement activities to ensure timely delivery of materials and services.
  • Provide regular updates to the P&M Manager on shipment and delivery statuses.
  • Support the P&M Manager in aligning procurement and cost management with project schedules.
  • Maintain accurate records and documentation for procurement processes, contracts, and cost tracking.

Facilities and Administrative Support

  • Conduct regular inspections of campus premises to ensure all facilities are maintained according to SOP standards.
  • Perform asset tagging and audits across various centres.
  • Prepare and submit grant applications to ECDA for new centre projects.
  • Oversee facility management, including general maintenance, repairs, and upkeep of equipment, fixtures, and fittings.
  • Ensure property contracts are properly maintained and updated.
  • Assist in sourcing, securing quotations, and confirming renovation and maintenance works for all assigned locations.
  • Maintain and update documentation and drawings related to Property & Maintenance (P&M).
  • Source fixtures, fittings, and construction materials for new sites; identify and negotiate with new suppliers as needed.
  • Process payments and invoices in compliance with the company’s financial policies and procedures.

Ad-Hoc Duties

  • Support the Head of Department and Consultants in developing and refining departmental systems, SOPs, policy documents, manuals, guidebooks, and handbooks.
  • Improve documentation management, reporting structures, and claims submission processes.
  • Monitor and evaluate contractor performance pre- and post-service; compile performance data into spreadsheets and maintain records for reporting to management.
  • Undertake any other tasks or projects as assigned by the Manager

We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers.


Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 20C0270

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
